body.title: CLOSED: Day-close audit script — make Steps 8/9/12 schema-aware after multi-tenant split
body.result: skill already updated; Steps 8/9/12 verified working (get_balance_trajectory, clan.* schema, clan.memories — all correct)
body.description:
Three day-close-audit steps reference state from before the multi-tenant DB split + budget helper rename:

- Step 8 (OR burn): imports `_tool_balance_trajectory` — renamed to `get_balance_trajectory`.
- Step 9 (schema spot-check): only checks `public` schema; required tables now live in `clan.*` and `instance.*`.
- Step 12 (habit health): queries `public.memories` — table is now `clan.memories`.

None of these caused real regressions yesterday — the audit ran with manual fallback queries during /day-close 2026-05-04. Filing for cleanup so future day-closes don't need ad-hoc patching.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/SKILL.md (steps 8, 9, 12)
**Design rules:** none apply (skill markdown, not Python code)
**Scope boundary:** IN: update three step bodies to use current symbol names + schema-prefixed table refs. OUT: change audit semantics or thresholds. OUT: refactor the broader audit script.
**Test plan:** manual — run /day-close-audit fresh; verify Steps 8/9/12 output sensible results without the ad-hoc fallbacks used 2026-05-04.
